smg.text: Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Possible thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 5 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
